images.revised_prompt:
Create a 1:1 square professional Amazon-style ecommerce SKU color chart poster on a pure white background for a long woven polyester resistance band. Use the attached product references as the exact guide for the product: a wide flat woven fabric resistance band rolled into a neat coil with a short curved outer tail, soft fabric edges, thick textile strap, detailed knitted/woven texture, subtle stitching-like edge ridges, rounded roll, commercial product photography lighting and soft shadows. 

Design a clean premium 9-item layout with balanced spacing and no visible grid lines: three rows by three columns, each item showing the same rolled band shape and proportions, identical perspective and texture, only the fabric color changes. Supported colors exactly: Light Pink, Light Purple, Dark Purple, Green, Pink, Purple, Light Gray, Dark Gray, Black. Do not add any other colors.

Place a small English color label below each product in a consistent position, modern clean sans-serif typography, dark gray text. Labels must read exactly: Light Pink, Light Purple, Dark Purple, Green, Pink, Purple, Light Gray, Dark Gray, Black. 

Premium polished commercial poster design, attractive soft studio lighting, crisp fabric texture, realistic soft shadows, high-converting ecommerce SKU chart. No logo on products. No Chinese text, no QR codes, no watermarks, no manufacturer/supplier/platform marks, no contact info, no website URLs, no price information. Product must remain identical in shape, woven texture, soft fabric edges, thickness, and proportions to reference; change only color. Ratio 1:1.
